query_normalized: dreamx-world 1.0: a general-purpose interactive world model computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it investigates the core mechanism of "embodied world models" for decision-making and coordination, which is the central component of the user's query regarding an "Interactive World Model." Although the specific application (multi-agent coordination) differs from the user's implied "general-purpose" scope, the paper provides foundational evidence on the utility and architecture of world models in interactive environments, making it a canonical refere
